debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
h1 : U ∼ V
h2 : ctble U
⊢ ctble V

failed_attempts:
by
  cases' h2 with f hf
  cases' h1 with g hg
  use f ∘ g.symm
  simp [hf, hg]

by
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h1
  rw [ctble] at h2 ⊢
  exact Setoid.equiv.of_surjective f hf.2 h2

by
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h1
  exact ⟨f, hf.2, h2⟩

by
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h1
  rw [ctble] at h2 ⊢
  exact Equinumerous.trans h2 hf.symm

  cases' h1 with g hg

  simp [hf, hg]

by

  cases' h1 with g hg

  cases' h1 with g hg
